summary: Completed the bounded SpecBridge v2 operation-list and report-schema hardening phase for issue #259. Claude Code ran first and produced a useful partial implementation but could not run tests in its permission mode. Codex reviewed, replaced the fragile raw-regex array check with a JSON property scanner, added report-schema regression coverage, corrected v2 push authorization for #259, validated locally, committed, pushed, and verified CI. The v2 commit 17519712a6ed3d6841cc63ed351bb945e7c2915f was pushed to origin/master and GitHub Actions CI passed.

policy_result: Within the dedicated issue #259 contract. The work did not access secrets, install dependencies, change production configuration, billing, authentication, authorization, databases, deployment automation, hosted runtimes, external AI providers, mutation-capable MCP tools, repository visibility, CI workflow security, force push, branch deletion, or remote deletion. The only remote mutation after local validation was the authorized normal non-force push to specbridge-v2 origin/master and GitHub CI/status reads.
risk_result: Medium-risk validator work was bounded to declared v2 files and additive tests. The validator now rejects malformed array fields, blank/non-string list entries, duplicate operation names, and allowed/forbidden operation conflicts while preserving existing exit codes and report fields.
unresolved_risks: The v1 evidence branch is local and not merged into main.
specbridge-v2 master remains unprotected because branch protection was previously blocked by GitHub plan/private visibility.
The operation-list validator enforces list shape and internal conflicts, but it does not execute or sandbox operations; runtime enforcement remains future scope.
merge_status: v2 master updated by normal non-force push. No autonomous merge into v1 main was performed; v1 evidence remains on branch codex/issue-255-serious-product-build-pilot and requires PR, CI, review, and explicit operator merge authority.
deployment_status: Not applicable. No deployment was requested or performed.
